name: MERN TypeScript Multi-Platform Starter
description: A full-stack MERN (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) starter template built with TypeScript, supporting web and mobile platforms with integrated authentication, testing, and modern development tooling.
features: Full-stack setup with Node.js, Express.js, React, and MongoDB
TypeScript support across frontend and backend
Multi-platform support: Web, Mobile Web, Android, and iOS
React frontend with React Router for navigation
React Native (Expo) setup for mobile applications
UI frameworks: NativeBase and Semantic UI React
Docker support and scalable project architecture
